abap_snippet: @AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZVSALESANL' @AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true @AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK @EndUserText.label: 'Sales Order Analytics View' @VDM.viewType: #COMPOSITE @Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE define view Z_I_SalesAnalytics as select from vbak as Header inner join vbap as Item on Header.vbeln = Item.vbeln inner join kna1 as Customer on Header.kunnr = Customer.kunnr left outer join mara as Material on Item.matnr = Material.matnr left outer join makt as MaterialText on Material.matnr = MaterialText.matnr and MaterialText.spras = 'E' { key Header.vbeln as SalesOrder, key Item.posnr as ItemNumber, Header.auart as OrderType, Header.erdat as CreatedDate, Header.vkorg as SalesOrganization, Header.vtweg as DistributionChannel, Header.spart as Division, Customer.kunnr as CustomerNumber, Customer.name1 as CustomerName, Customer.land1 as Country, Material.matnr as MaterialNumber, MaterialText.maktx as MaterialDescription, Material.mtart as MaterialType, Item.kwmeng as OrderQuantity, Item.netwr as NetValue, Item.waerk as Currency, cast( Item.netwr / nullif(Item.kwmeng,0) as abap.dec(15,2) ) as UnitPrice, case when Item.netwr >

generated_sql_snippet: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW Z_I_SalesAnalytics AS SELECT Header.vbeln AS SalesOrder, Item.posnr AS ItemNumber, Header.auart AS OrderType, Header.erdat AS CreatedDate, Header.vkorg AS SalesOrganization, Header.vtweg AS DistributionChannel, Header.spart AS Division, Customer.kunnr AS CustomerNumber, Customer.name1 AS CustomerName, Customer.land1 AS Country, Material.matnr AS MaterialNumber, MaterialText.maktx AS MaterialDescription, Material.mtart AS MaterialType, Item.kwmeng AS OrderQuantity, Item.netwr AS NetValue, Item.waerk AS Currency, CAST( Item.netwr / NULLIF(Item.kwmeng, 0) AS DECIMAL(15,2) ) AS UnitPrice, CASE WHEN Item.netwr > 100000 THEN 'HIGH_VALUE' WHEN Item.netwr > 50000 THEN 'MEDIUM_VALUE' ELSE 'STANDARD' END AS SalesCategory FROM vbak AS Header INNER JOIN vbap AS Item ON Header.vbeln = Item.vbeln INNER JOIN kna1 AS Customer ON Header.kunnr = Customer.kunnr LEFT OUTER JOIN mara AS Material ON Item.matnr = Material.matnr LEFT OUTER JOIN makt AS MaterialText ON Material.matnr = MaterialText.matnr AND MaterialText.spras = 'E' WHERE Header.auart IN ('OR', 'TA', 'ZOR');
